name: stardust-local
description: Local development marketplace for the Stardust plugin

plugins.name: stardust
plugins.description: Make stardust the context spine of a Claude Code session: MCP server, session-start policy and live workspace state, maintenance and digest crons, plus authoring commands (/stardust:execute, /stardust:spec, /stardust:plan, /stardust:doc, /stardust:adr) that write specs, plans, ADRs, and docs inline. Works for an Obsidian vault and a docs-convention code repo.
